title: William Morgan Sheppard
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image=[[File:WilliamMorganSheppard.jpg]] |name=William Morgan Sheppard |birth=[[August 24]], [[1930s|1932]] |death=[[January 6]], [[2019]]
[[Wikipedia:Los Angeles|Los Angeles]], [[Wikipedia:California|California]] |listedpronouns= |nationality=British |occupation=Actor |companies= |website= }} '''William Morgan Sheppard''' ([[August 24]], [[1930s|1932]] – [[January 6]], [[2019]]) was a British actor who voiced the Heavy Gun Trooper and the Ruulian Strip Miner in ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''. He also voiced the character Ignatius Cheese in the 2000 [[LucasArts]] game [[Wikipedia:Escape from Monkey Island|''Escape from Monkey Island'']].{{WebCite|url=https://scummbar.com/games/index.php?game=4&sub=info&todo=2|text=Escape from Monkey Island - Cast & Crew…|archivedate=20190214140526}} In [[2011]], he appeared in the sixth series of the new series of [[Wikipedia:Doctor Who|''Doctor Who'']] in the episode ''The Impossible Astronaut''. He is one of several actors to have appeared in both [[Wikipedia:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']] and ''[[Star Wars]]'', playing Ira Graves in [[Wikipedia:Star Trek: The Next Generation|''Star Trek: The Next Generation'']], the Klingon Commandant in [[Wikipedia:Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country|''Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country'']], Qatai in [[Wikipedia:Star Trek: Voyager|''Star Trek: Voyager'']] and the Vulcan science minister in the [[2009]] film [[Wikipedia:Star Trek (film)|''Star Trek'']]. Sheppard passed away on [[January 6]], [[2019]] at the age of 86 in [[Wikipedia:Los Angeles|Los Angeles]], [[Wikipedia:California|California]].{{WebCite|url=https://www.mirror.co.uk/3am/celebrity-news/william-morgan-sheppard-dead-star-13823875|text=William Morgan Sheppard dead: Star Trek actor dies aged 86|author=Saunders, Emmeline|date=2019-01-07|archiveurl=https://archive.vn/lAZ68}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{WP|W. Morgan Sheppard}} *{{IMDb|name/nm0792003}} [[Category:Deceased actors]] [[Category:Star Wars: Force Commander voice actors]]
